content:
y. It is very easy to overlook the points you bring up, especially if you read the prompts before you begin to read the story.


Student Submission:

The submissions for this assignment are posts in the assignment's discussion. Below are the discussion posts for Michelle Herman, or you can view the full discussion.

from Week 5 Discussion
Feb 6, 2025 7:05PM
Michelle Herman
Eudora Welty’s “The Worn Path” is laden with symbolism, which is used to exhibit themes of perseverance and sacrifice through the story’s main character. As Phoenix Jackson portrays determination and selflessness along her dangerous journey, it is revealed that her grandson is the motivation for the travels she has endured. Although elderly and fragile, Phoenix faces many obstacles on her path to obtain medication for her ill grandson. The story moves through symbolism to depict her determination and focus on her loved one, despite what hurdles she may meet along the way.
